risk_factors: Single line change (+1/-0) makes it difficult to assess full impact without git diff context
Change involves JSON schema response format handling which could affect data validation
Modification in core Azure OpenAI integration component affects all model interactions
positive_findings: Comprehensive input validation with Assert.notNull() checks throughout constructors
Proper error handling and exception management for unknown message types
Well-structured separation of concerns with dedicated methods for different operations
Appropriate use of Spring AI patterns for model integration and tool calling
Robust observation and monitoring integration with Micrometer
Thread-safe implementation using atomic operations for streaming responses
Secure handling of media data with proper Base64 encoding for images
risk_summary: This appears to be a minimal fix adding a strict option to JSON schema response format handling. The change is isolated and the existing codebase demonstrates good security practices and proper error handling patterns.
